title: Tier-Eval v2 Run Registry Row
description: Canonical schema for one row in the tier-eval v2 run registry. See host/test/docs/base/TIER-EVAL-V2-SPRINT-PLAN.md §3 (Sprint 0.1) and the source strategy doc §6.2. Every sweep row — production, pilot, smoke, dry_run, overnight_screen, admission — lands here. Hardware fields are intentionally minimal: tier-16/32/64 each map to a single physical machine, so hardware_id and soc_generation are omitted.

run_id.description: Stable row identity. UUID v4 from the harness side.

run_kind.description: What kind of run this row represents. Production lower-tier sweeps cannot start until the Sprint 0 sign-off gate (§3 of the sprint plan) is met.

canonical_status.description: Bucket label for dashboarding. `canonical` rows are the default population; `legacy-*` rows must be visibly tagged in any aggregate; `excluded` rows must not be aggregated.

hardware_tier.description: Memory-target tier in GB. Single physical machine per tier.

memory_gb.description: Physical memory of the machine that produced this row. Should match hardware_tier for canonical rows.

config_id.description: Coarse bundle label grouping rows by serving/harness stack before any data is collected (OPENCODE-HARNESS-AB-PLAN.md §4.5). `claw-rig` is the established claw + llama-server stack; `opencode-a` is the opencode harness bundle (bare workspace). `opencode-a+git` / `opencode-a+prompt` are the tier-16 sidecar-port arms (OPENCODE-SIDECAR-PORT-HANDOFF.md §4): both git-initialize /workspace (OpenCode rules discovery no-ops in a bare dir); `+prompt` additionally plants claw's system-prompt.md as a committed AGENTS.md. Complementary to — not a replacement for — `model_config_id`, which is the fine-grained serving fingerprint.

model_config_id.description: Stable key into the model-config manifest (Sprint 0.2). Resolves to model_id, family, parameter_count, quantization, context_limit, runtime_backend, sampler_config_id, harness_version, prompt_pack_version.

model_id.description: Convenience denormalization of the model_id from the model-config manifest. Required for any row that aggregates without joining to the manifest.

quantization.description: Quantization format and parameters (e.g. `Q4_K_M`, `MLX-4bit`). Denormalized from model_config_id.

context_limit.description: Effective context window available to the harness for this run. Denormalized from model_config_id.

sampler_config_id.description: Stable key for the sampler settings (temperature, top-p, top-k, presence penalty, seed policy) used in this run.

seed.description: Random seed if the sampler/task generator supports one. Required for paired comparisons; null for unseeded sampling.

harness_version.description: Git SHA or release identifier of the test harness.

prompt_pack_version.description: System / developer / task prompt pack version. Null if not yet versioned.

test_id.description: Stable test family identifier. For Sprint 1 this is the basename of a file under host/test/__tests__/tier-eval/ (e.g. `expression-eval`, `csv-parser`).

test_version.description: Exact prompt/verifier version for this test. Bump when the prompt or oracle changes.

oracle_type.description: How pass/fail was determined. Hidden-holdout rows come from the gitignored host/test/__tests__/tier-eval-hidden/ directory.

timeout_budget_ms.description: Time budget in milliseconds enforced for this run. Iteration budgets, if applicable, go in `iteration_budget`.

iteration_budget.description: Iteration budget for this run, if the harness enforces one separately from the time budget.

end_time.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at run end. Null if the run aborted before completion telemetry could fire.

terminal_status.description: Why the run stopped. `harness_error` runs are excluded from model-task pass-rate comparisons (Layer A discipline).

passed.description: Final model-task pass/fail. Null when terminal_status is `harness_error` or `interrupted` and pass/fail cannot be assessed.

harness_error.description: Typed error category if terminal_status indicates a harness-side problem (e.g. `bridge_unreachable`, `assertion_emit_failed`).

iters_count.description: Sprint 1.16 enrichment. Count of records in iterations.jsonl for the run — i.e., number of LLM iterations claw made before terminating. Combined with end_time-start_time gives Sprint 2's p90 iters/wallclock §8 column. Zero when the iterations.jsonl is empty or absent (e.g., very early aborts).

trace_artifact_uri.description: Path or URI to the run's trace artifacts (iterations.jsonl, run_summary.json, sessions/, bridge.iterations.jsonl). Typically `host/test/.claw-runtime/<run_id>/`.

screening_only.description: True for overnight_screen rows. When true, the row must not be used for durable keep/drop, model admission, or sampler comparison decisions.
